response.original_title: [{((FAQ))}] What happens when you have Dollar $25,000 in Robinhood?
response.overview: Having $25,000 in Robinhood  can change how your trading account works, especially if you use a margin account . [[ 1 ⟿ 888 ⟿ 576 ⟿ 2041 ]] You may get Pattern Day Trader (PDT) status removed, allowing more frequent day trades without strict limits ✔️. [[ 1 ⟿ 888 ⟿ 576 ⟿ 2041 ]] This balance also gives you higher buying power and flexibility in trading strategies . However, you must keep your equity above $25,000; if it drops below, trading restrictions can return .[[ 1 ⟿ 888 ⟿ 576 ⟿ 2041 ]]
